creator: alexander.kuehn@nagilum.de
text:
Ok, now that I think of it a workaround is:
mv /usr/bin/m4 /usr/bin/m4.bak && ln -s /usr/local/bin/gm4 /usr/bin/m4
then build and then revert.
rm /usr/bin/m4 && mv /usr/bin/m4.bak /usr/bin/m4
and it seems work.
